name: claude-cowork-lunch-learn
description: 3 hands-on exercises for a 1.5h Claude Cowork lunch & learn. Each plugin teaches a different capability: LinkedIn content creation, meeting intelligence with MCPs, and metaskills for building your own skills.

plugins.name: 01-linkedin-content
plugins.description: Build your voice profile and write LinkedIn posts that sound like you.

plugins.name: 02-meeting-intelligence
plugins.description: Onboard your meeting stack, then get AI-powered pre-call briefs and post-meeting debriefs.

plugins.name: 03-metaskills
plugins.description: Skills that help you think, solve problems, and build new skills from scratch.
